creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for the patch!

Did you test this with the current ocaml 4.08.1 in the tree? Does it work fine with it?

Since at present ocaml 4.12 is not present in the tree there's no hurry to get this patch in.

I'd rather wait until there is a patch to get 4.12 in.


As I suggested in a direct email, if you plan to send patch to update ocaml to 4.12 you should bound together that with al other fixed required to other ports and send it for review.

Personally I'd suggest using phabricator for that and filing PRs as needed referencing it get approval from the various committers. Then the big patch can be committed in one go, this would give better results, make review and actual commit easier.


You can look how I handled things when updating to 4.08.1 at [1] and [2], and [3] fir the actual commit, which looks like the best approach to me.


[1] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=272067

[2] https://reviews.freebsd.org/D40599

[3] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=2b40e4609399858e2bfbddcf961bd7c947f6ed2c
